name: PhD Candidate
history: PhD candidate engaged in scientific research. References to a sequencing-related study and a colleague named Kelly. Working on a project with a senior scientist who has struggled to gain recognition in his career.
intermediate_belief: I must prove my worth through my work.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't succeed, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of discussing concerns and focusing on trivial matters.
situation: Working on a PhD project and concerned about its progress.
auto_thought: I might not be able to complete my project successfully.
behavior: Avoidance of discussing significant issues, focusing on trivial matters.
